Author: Aida Enna
Description:
When a party member gets on a mount that supports more than 1 person and is close enough, you will automatically get on.

This plugin is in testing and will have one or more issues, laid out below:

- You may need to right click on the driver once each time you start the game before the plugin will automount their mount. A fix is being investigated.

Please report issues/bugs and post suggestions on the Github website by clicking the globe icon.
Name: Auto Pillion
Punchline: Automatically ride on other people's mounts!

Author: erdelf, Herculezz
Changelog:
## What's Changed
* Adding SetLevelingMode IPC by @JerVenture in https://github.com/erdelf/AutoDuty/pull/254
* Removed unnecessary revival steps & added back in the steps you requested by @Katsuvera in https://github.com/erdelf/AutoDuty/pull/255
* Added paths for Neverreap, Hullbreaker Isle (Hard), Kugane Castle, Interphos by @ShermTank7272 in https://github.com/erdelf/AutoDuty/pull/257
* ARR Dungeon Updgrades / Adjustments by @Katsuvera in https://github.com/erdelf/AutoDuty/pull/262
* Neverreap, Hullbreaker Hard fixes by @ShermTank7272 in https://github.com/erdelf/AutoDuty/pull/261
* Small Adjustments to Misc. Paths by @Katsuvera in https://github.com/erdelf/AutoDuty/pull/266
* Added Boss Names to ARR Trials by @Katsuvera in https://github.com/erdelf/AutoDuty/pull/267
* Merchant's Tale 5,6,9,10 adjusted by @erdelf in https://github.com/erdelf/AutoDuty/pull/268
* Added path for The Twinning by @ShermTank7272 in https://github.com/erdelf/AutoDuty/pull/272
* Kill In Range moving while not stopping for combat by @erdelf in https://github.com/erdelf/AutoDuty/pull/273
* ARR Normal & Savage Raid Update (and Brayflox Change) by @Katsuvera in https://github.com/erdelf/AutoDuty/pull/271
* (1315) Merchant's Tale: Paths 5,6,9,10 updated with new bossmod modules by @erdelf in https://github.com/erdelf/AutoDuty/pull/269

## New Contributors
* @JerVenture made their first contribution in https://github.com/erdelf/AutoDuty/pull/254
* @ShermTank7272 made their first contribution in https://github.com/erdelf/AutoDuty/pull/257

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/erdelf/AutoDuty/compare/0.0.0.299...0.0.0.300
Description: A plugin to run dungeons for you with Trust, Duty Support, Squadrons, Variants, and Regular, Requires BossMod, vnavmesh and a Rotation Plugin (BossMod AutoRotation, Wrath or RotationSolverReborn)
Name: AutoDuty
Punchline: Dungeons while you sleep, eat, or work. (Swimsuit Shtola made easy.)

Author: Aida Enna
Description:
Allows for a macro to continue onto the next macro by using '/nextmacro' on the last line of a macro.
Adding '/nextmacro' on the last line of Macro #01 will automatically execute Macro #02
Adding '/nextmacro down' on the last line of Macro #01 will automatically execute Macro #11
Also allows executing any macro from chat using '/runmacro'
You can repeat a macro by using /runmacro inside the macro followed by the number of the macro you're editing
Using '/macrocancel' will stop the currently running macro
Name: Macro Chain Redux
Punchline: A modified fork of the old Macro Chain that allows you to run multiple macros one after the other (or repeat them).

Author: Aida Enna
Description:
When you click "Update Gear Set", this plugin will automatically update and save your portait to match your new glam.

This plugin is in testing and will have one or more issues, laid out below:

- Rarely, a glitched desynth window will pop up when saving the gearset instead of it saving the portait. This is being investigated, closing the window and swapping classes seems to fix it.

Please report issues/bugs and post suggestions on the Github website by clicking the globe icon.
Name: Portrait Fixer
Punchline: Automatically update your portait when your gearset gets updated
